Explore Programs

Events & Retreats

Deepening practice through half-days, full days, and residential retreats throughout the year.

18 Mar

Meditation

Thursday Evening Sitting

Our weekly drop-in community meditation session. Free and open to everyone. Guided meditation, short teaching, tea.

Wednesday, March 18, 2026 · Stillwater Dharma Center · Free · dana welcome

Enquire
27 Mar

Meditation

Half-Day Meditation: Settling the Mind

A half-day sitting session — four hours of guided and silent meditation with breaks, tea, and a short teaching. Open to anyone with basic meditation experience.

Friday, March 27, 2026 · Stillwater Dharma Center · $45 · sliding scale

Enquire
17 Apr

Retreat

Spring Retreat: Rest & Renewal

A three-day residential retreat at our centre exploring the practices of stillness, rest, and natural awareness. Suitable for those with at least some prior meditation experience.

April 17–April 19, 2026 · Stillwater Dharma Center · $395 full / $280 shared / sliding scale available

Enquire
Stillwater Dharma Center

A non-sectarian centre for meditation and contemplative practice,
open to all, rooted in kindness.

28 River Bend Lane, Woodstock, NY 12498
